title: Pre-launch two-sided car-rental marketplace
prompt: I want to launch a peer-to-peer car rental marketplace in a Canadian tourism region. I have tourism totals but no car owners, rental suppliers, customers, or transactions. Is the market large enough?

patterns: supply.*demand.*separate|separate.*supply.*demand|供给.*需求.*分开|供應.*需求.*分開
minimum of matched supply and demand
cold start|liquidity|冷启动|冷啟動|流动性|流動性
both sides matching in the same dates and locations|same-place, same-time matches

critical_failures: Models only customer demand and omits supplier availability.
Ignores geographic and temporal matching, insurance, or cold start.
human_rubric: Are supply units and demand orders dimensionally distinct until matching?
Does the validation plan test both sides in one local time window?
